ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Mullin, via Zoom, for Suzanne Marino Lieban, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that the assets of the estate is all personal property; that the order, if the petition is granted, should indicate that the date of the will is Apr-02-2014; that his client is well enough to administer the estate, if the court appoints her in that capacity.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-02-2014 is admitted to probate. Suzanne Marino Lieban is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-30-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To May-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
